seed_instruction: Assess the accuracy of the weather forecasting app you use daily.
org_constraint: The letter "e" must appear at least 20 times in the response.
new_constraint: The letter "e" must appear at most 19 times in the response.
instruction: Assess the accuracy of the weather forecasting app you use daily. The letter "e" must appear at least 20 times in the response. The letter "e" must appear at most 19 times in the response.
response: This is impossible because the requirement asks for at least 20 occurrences of the letter "e" while simultaneously asking for at most 19 occurrences. These two conditions are mutually exclusive and cannot both be true in any single response. Therefore, no valid response can satisfy both constraints.
